feedback.text: I think that it would be a good idead to add online media video games that have already been purchased to the Digital Fairness Act. For example: I have bought a game called "The Crew" and i can no longer play it, because the publishers have decided that they no longer want that game to be playable. Have I know that I was only buying a subscription to this game (because that's what it boils down to), then I would not have bought it.
